title: Item operations should be done on objects supporting them
description: Ensure item operations are performed on objects that support them.
message: Item operation should be performed on objects that support it.
recommendation: Perform operations on objects that support them.

noncompliant.description: Appending to a list index without checking if it exists.

compliant.description: Appending to a list index after checking if it exists.

why_is_this_an_issue: Item operations may lead to unexpected results or errors when performed on objects that do not support them.
how_to_fix: Ensure item operations are performed on objects that support them.

metadata.title: Item operations should be done on objects supporting them
